summary: All 9 criteria pass, 8/8 required. Full suite 2309 tests pass — zero regressions. Both safety invariants independently verified (grep + guard test): gepa.ts/evolve.ts never write agents/; pipeline.ts never imports/calls evolve|gepa. proposeVariants deterministic (mulberry32, no Math.random); paretoSet drops dominated variants; strict promotion predicate (regressions===0 AND improvements > baseline — tie does NOT promote); report.json always written, promoted/<role>.md only on win & !dryRun. No SDK imports in gepa.ts/evolve.ts. The 15-vs-19 test count is the gepa(15)+evolve(4) file split, not a defect.
